summary: OATH's preliminary Fiscal 2026 report shows this specific channel improved sharply: even as the number of people contacting the Help Center by email or voicemail grew 17 percent year-over-year, the average time to receive assistance after leaving an email or voicemail fell about 80 percent in the first four months of FY26 compared to the same period in FY25.

sources.label: OATH, Preliminary Fiscal 2026 Mayor's Management Report
